summary: Iteration 55 — Program Photos feature gated by `program_photos` flag. Backend: 16/16 pytest tests PASSED in /app/backend/tests/test_program_photos.py covering check-access (200/whitelisted=true; 401 unauth), superadmin PUT /feature-flags/program_photos add/remove + reflected in subsequent /check-access (true→false→true), upload gating (403 when flag off, 200 image_url when on, 400 for bad content-type, 400 for >5MB), DELETE image (403 when off, 200 + image_url cleared when on), serve image (200 bytes for uploaded paths, 404 for paths not starting with budezivo/programs/, 404 for non-existent), public /api/programs/public/{institution_id} works for both whitelisted and non-whitelisted institutions (regression), and route ordering does not shadow /features/check-access. Frontend: verified whitelisted institution shows program-photo-card + program-photo-upload-zone in edit dialog; non-whitelisted institution hides program-photo-card entirely (correctly toggled by /api/programs/features/check-access). Superadmin → Feature flagy tab renders the 'Fotografie programů' (program_photos) card with whitelist controls — Budeživo Platform checkbox correctly checked.

issues: Console warning: 'Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent}.' — radix Dialog a11y warning, not a blocker but worth adding DialogDescription for accessibility.

action_items: (Nice-to-have) Add aria-describedby / DialogDescription to the program edit Dialog to silence Radix a11y warning.

(Optional hardening) The route GET /api/programs/{program_id} is declared BEFORE GET /api/programs/image/{path:path} and GET /api/programs/features/check-access. In the current code this is safe (single-segment vs multi-segment paths and dedicated literal subpaths) and verified via TestRouteCollision, but moving the literal/multi-segment routes ABOVE /{program_id} would be more defensive against future changes.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: feature_flags.is_feature_enabled correctly OR-s global enabled with whitelist membership (services/feature_flags.py).
VERIFIED: Upload validates content_type (ALLOWED_IMAGE_TYPES) and size (MAX_PROGRAM_IMAGE_SIZE = 5MB) returning 400 with Czech messages.
VERIFIED: Upload persists image_url=/api/programs/image/budezivo/programs/{...} on the program row, retrievable via subsequent GET /api/programs/{id}.
VERIFIED: DELETE clears image_url to null and is gated by the same _require_program_photos check.
VERIFIED: Path restriction on serve_program_image — paths not starting with 'budezivo/programs/' return 404 ('Fotografie nenalezena'); non-existent storage objects also return 404.
VERIFIED: PUT /api/superadmin/feature-flags/program_photos accepts add_institution_ids and remove_institution_ids; idempotent for unknown UUIDs; whitelist immediately reflected in /check-access.
VERIFIED: GET /api/programs/public/{institution_id} continues to work for non-whitelisted institutions (Test Muzeum) — no regression.
VERIFIED: Frontend gates program-photo-card via /api/programs/features/check-access response — toggling whitelist hides/shows the upload UI on next dialog open.
VERIFIED: SuperadminPage Feature flagy tab uses the 'Fotografie programů' human label from FEATURE_FLAG_LABELS.program_photos and the raw key 'program_photos' is shown.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — all gating + superadmin tab paths verified end-to-end

seed_data_creation: Tests create their own TEST_program_photos_pytest / TEST_e2e_photo programs and clean them up via DELETE in fixtures and at end of script. The whitelist for Budeživo Platform on program_photos is restored at the end of every run (test toggles it for the negative case).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Re-run with: `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://arch-enhance-v59.preview.emergentagent.com pytest /app/backend/tests/test_program_photos.py -v`. Note: ProgramCreate requires age_group AND target_group (e.g. 'ms_3_6') in addition to name_cs/name_en/description_cs/description_en/duration/min_capacity/max_capacity. The /admin/programs page uses [data-testid='program-card-{id}'] (clicking the card opens the edit dialog) — there is NO 'edit-program-{id}' testid. Frontend ProgramsPage calls /api/programs/features/check-access on mount and toggles `programPhotosEnabled` to render the photo card; toggling whitelist requires reload of the programs page to refetch.
rca of the issue: N/A — feature works as designed; no bugs found.
